content:
“持灯者的使徒、诞于白夜之人、驱散黑暗者、圣心圣子，我，波吕克斯，应您的呼唤而来。”

“这颗聆听神意的心脏，与您更加靠近了。”

——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

"The Apostle of the Lightbearer, scion of the White Night, One who Dispels Darkness, Divus of the Divine Heart—I, Pollux, have answered your call."

"This heart, which once heeded the divine will, now beats closer to yours."
@everyone
thread_title: V2.3.4 全新唤醒体✦波吕克斯┊New Awakener✦Pollux

content:
布散光明的教会，实为扼断生机的歹人；
尊为圣子的存在，实为难保自身的囚徒；
反抗逃匿？只会让你更快变成邪神的养料。
就这样，保持顺从保持无害，别让你的想法、恐惧、软肋被他们看穿。

笼罩在庞然阴影之下的惊惧雏鸟，悟出了获取一丝喘息机会的技巧：
圆滑、撒谎、表演……若能在地狱中保护好彼此，有何不可呢？
「没关系的，哥哥。」

——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

The church's preaching light is the true enemy—a force that strangles life itself.
The twins, though revered as divine, are nothing but stranded prisoners.
To fight or to flee? Either choice simply speeds up the impending doom.

Rule of Survival: *Keep to your orders, be docile and meek... Don't show your thoughts, fear, or any weak spot.*

The fledglings, trapped under that vast shadow, seized the skill to buy a moment's respite:
To be slick and sly, to lie and disguise... Any measure is justified so long as they can protect each other within this hellish prison.
"We'll be fine... Brother."
thread_title: V2.3.4 波吕克斯情报：雏鸟的生存之道┊About Pollux: The Fledgling's Art of Survival
